name: Improved STL Validator v3 (ASCII + Binary, all checks)
description: Validates ASCII and binary STL files for manufacturing suitability: detects format automatically, checks manifold integrity (open AND non-manifold edges), degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, inverted normals (any direction mismatch vs winding order, not just near-perfect inversions), and binary file size consistency. Fixes all known defects in the provided validator.
